def eligible_for_sleep_apnea_treatment(self) -> bool:
        if (self.gender in [gender.value for gender in Gender] and
            self.age >= 18 and
            self.race in [race.value for race in Race] and
            self.employment_status in [status.value for status in EmploymentStatus] and
            self.education in [edu.value for edu in Education] and
            self.marital_status in [status.value for status in MaritalStatus] and
            self.religion in [religion.value for religion in Religion] and
            4.0 <= self.sleep_apnea_risk_score <= 10.0):
            return True
        else:
            return False
